title: Escape from Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Robin, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Robin, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from enies lobby: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That spanda bastard!! He's still alive!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's impossible not to get hit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The whirlpools messed up our aim!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't be swallowed up by the current!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Idiots! Why did you close the gates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't be so happy, all right?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: There's no sea that Merry can't cross

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't let them get away. Fire!!!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Robin, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from enies lobby: rising conflict.
